title: Swamp Thaaaang
description: The fourth installment in the Swamp Thang saga, based on real life, tragic events that occurred at Camp Ogawa, Maine in the summer of 1995.
quote: Judy, relax. There’s nothing out here. Tonight it’s just you and me, okay?
altHero: swamp monster coming out from the water
alt1: boy and girl camp counselors about to kiss on a picnic blanket in the woods at night
alt2: the girl hears something in the woods
alt3: they are about to kiss but behind them, water is splashing
alt4: swamp monster splashing out of the water
